result.stdout:
dotnet-rename options path

options:
  -?   Show help info
  -u   Convert all letters to uppercase
  -l   Convert all letters to lowercase
  -iu  Convert first letter to uppercase
  -il  Convert first letter to lowercase

example:
  Convert all files in directory
    dotnet-rename -u e:\js

  Convert specified file
    dotnet-rename -u e:\js\example.js

commands.payload:
dotnet-rename options path

options:
  -?   Show help info
  -u   Convert all letters to uppercase
  -l   Convert all letters to lowercase
  -iu  Convert first letter to uppercase
  -il  Convert first letter to lowercase

example:
  Convert all files in directory
    dotnet-rename -u e:\js

  Convert specified file
    dotnet-rename -u e:\js\example.js
